change_summary: Added rule to split feature-specific services such as WaitingService from ReservationService
Added rank calculation preference for direct count/query over loading full collection
Added entity naming rule to prefer domain noun Waiting and delete unused speculative methods
Added feature/layer split rule for domain repository service controller and acceptance tests
Added Java class member ordering convention reference
Added consistent role authorization boundary and authenticated member lookup rules
Added rule to use a small promotion/orchestration service for reservation-waiting conversion
Added resource-vs-role controller grouping consistency and compatibility alias rules
Added bulk read preference over per-row exists mapping for list responses
Added review checks for controller grouping authorization boundary promotion ownership repeated member lookup and bulk mapping
Added response DTO factory naming rule for from one-source conversion and of conversion with additional calculated values
Added rule that argument resolvers extract web input and delegate token session member validation to an auth service
Added sibling usecase validation helper consistency rule
Added review checks for DTO factory naming web auth responsibility and validation helper consistency
Added domain construction rule for single-object invariants and persistence-rule boundary
Added domain constructor tests JPA slice WebMvc slice HTTP naming service unit and fixed Clock rules
Added review checks for domain invariants repository slice controller slice naming and service unit coverage
Added rule to keep simple invariant validation inside owning domain class and avoid generic DomainValidator by default
Added conditional given when then comment rule for service mock tests and long acceptance flows
Added review checks for domain owned validation and complex test flow boundaries
Added rule to serialize same-subject session renewal and avoid leaking DB uniqueness conflicts
Added real concurrent test rule for concurrency requirements and direct tests for custom token providers
Added review checks for stateful auth races scoped login locks real concurrent tests and token provider tests
